headline: Is Chevron (CVX) Balancing Dividend Strength With Rising Geopolitical Risk In Its Energy Strategy?
summary: In recent days, Chevron has extended its 39-year dividend growth streak, agreed a settlement over invalid renewable fuel credits, and joined other oil majors in warning U.S. officials that the Iran war and disruptions around the Strait of Hormuz could worsen the global energy crisis. At the same time, Chevron is pursuing new production agreements in Venezuela and benefiting from inclusion in high-profile dividend funds, underscoring how its integrated model ties shareholder payouts,...
